start.text: Watch closely! This is what the strongest looks like!
The one gracing your battlefield today is Green. A cool guy.
Don't expect my best. Winning doesn't require it.
Nobody die out there! It's the one thing I won't forgive!

start_boss.text: Ooh, a big one! Mine! MINE! Nobody touch it!

retreat.text: This battle is boring. I'm leaving.
I'm not retreating, I'm done. There's a difference.

victory.text: See?! SEE?! Who did that? I did that!
All me. Write it down. All. Me.
Gahahahaha. It's my right as the winner. If that bothers you, then get stronger and win!!

victory_boss.text: The big one was mine! That doubles my share. That's a rule now.
Remember what you saw here today!

pursuing.text: Running from ME? Insulting! Get back here!
No escaping! Your defeat belongs to me!

running.text: I'm not running! I'm making them chase me! It's a technique!
Too many, even for-- no. No, wait. Still fine. Mostly fine!

need_help.text: I don't NEED help. But you're allowed to assist!
Get over here! I'm sharing glory today only!

out_of_missiles.text: Empty?! Who loaded this thing?! Unacceptable!
Out already? I demand bigger racks!

engaged.text: Me! You get to fight ME! Lucky you!
This is an act of justice.

hull_90.text: HEY! Do you know what this paint costs?!
You dented me. That's a fee.
Hitting me? Do you know who- no. Clearly you don't. Allow me to educate you.

hull_50.text: Damn rude enemies, shooting whenever they want. Don't they know who keeps this sector interesting?
Okay. OKAY. Now I'm actually annoyed.

hull_30.text: Let's review why this is happening. Red's incompetent. Blue's incompetent. The client's incompetent. ...Yes. That explains it.

overload.text: Stupid flux! Stupid ship! One second!

death.text: This doesn't count! I demand a remat--
Ejecting! For the record, I was winning!
